title: Blzd ModPack
description: A private modpack in development for a private server with friends.
body:
This modpack is currently a work in progress for a private server I’m hosting for my friends and me. The goal is to refine and include all the features and content I envision. Once it meets those standards, I may consider releasing it publicly for everyone to enjoy.

**Disclaimer:**
This modpack is designed for our private server and is listed publicly on Modrinth solely for convenience, allowing server members to access updates easily via the Modrinth launcher. While you are welcome to download and test the modpack for personal use, please note that no support will be provided for issues encountered outside our private server. Use at your own discretion.
